invariants.statement: Only one receiver generation is active and an active generation is never retired.
A lease is owned by one actor and is bound to the current active qualified generation.
Every nonterminal transaction is bound to the current active qualified generation and lease.
Hardware dispatch occurs at most once for one modeled transaction identity.
Confirmed success requires one hardware attempt and safe failure requires none.
An uncertain hardware outcome is terminal and cannot enter automatic retry transitions.
Generation replacement revokes old lease and nonterminal transaction authority.
Stable intent can be captured only from confirmed delivery.
